prompt:
Scene:
A polished Prompt Atlas production image for the theme Film Storyboard Sequence. Build a finished, gallery-ready visual demonstration rather than a generic mood board. The setting should be specific, coherent, and immediately readable, with lighting, viewpoint, and environment chosen to support a more dramatic gallery variation.

Subject:
Create gallery variant as a self-contained image that demonstrates Film Storyboard Sequence. The main subject should occupy the visual center of gravity, with clear supporting details around it. Use the theme's capability focus: structured layout and clear information hierarchy, material physics, optical behavior, and tactile surface detail, technical diagram clarity and callout structure, commercial presentation polish and practical product framing.

Important details:
High production value, precise composition, clean hierarchy, crop-safe framing, and no unrelated filler. Make the visual evidence of the theme visible at thumbnail size and still rewarding in close inspection. Use believable materials, intentional color contrast, and consistent design language across all elements.

Use case:
Independent single-image study in Prompt Atlas, intended for a gallery card and detail modal. It should prove the theme direction before deeper series production.

Constraints:
No watermark, no real brand logo, no private data, no temporary URLs, no task ids, no messy extra panels, no unreadable clutter, no accidental duplicate main subjects, preserve exact 4:5 aspect ratio.
title: Gallery Variant
description: Gallery Variant is an independent study for the Film Storyboard Sequence theme.

generation.runner_notes: Independent prompted image; no reference URL required.
